title: Cuneiform Tablet #0884: Middle Babylonian Royal Inscription
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Babylonian period. Royal Inscription document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records royal inscription matters typical of Middle Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
